name: Dreamcatcher Mind
overview: Dreamcatcher Mind is the first solo reality show unveiled by Dreamcatcher four years after their debut, and it is a variety of escape from the present life that Dreamcatcher, who shook the stage with intense charisma, decided and fought for. Each time, they plan to release a variety of concepts and hidden entertainment.

trailers.title: The Real Variety for the First Time will premiere on May 26! Dreamcatcher Mind
